draft_communication.recipient: Event organizer via vendor contact form
draft_communication.subject: Juke's Diner - Vendor Application Status for East Nashville Beer Fest
draft_communication.body_template:
Hi there,

We submitted a vendor application for Juke's Diner to participate in the East Nashville Beer Fest on April 11th. Could you please confirm:

1. Status of our application
2. Deposit deadline ($150 noted)
3. Any additional requirements or next steps

We're excited about the opportunity to serve your festival and want to make sure we complete everything on time.

Thanks,
John Jukes
Juke's Diner
[contact info]

notes.author: jukes-social-agent
